overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic urban waterfront plaza. The player moves past vending machines and casualties, then proceeds along a neon-lit promenade with illuminated benches and planters, passing other pedestrians in a dystopian city environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza corner with vending machines and casualties

events.description: camera pans left revealing dead bodies on the ground near the vending machines
moving from vending machine corner into open plaza area with orange overhead structure

agents.ego_description: moving through a plaza past blue vending machines and casualties lying on the wet pavement

entered.detail: blue vending machine with yellow accents advertising BIG
large rectangular concrete planter with mature tree
pile of black garbage bags against the wall
casualties lying on the yellow pavement
large orange overhead structural support beam

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on blue vending machines in a semi-covered plaza corner. As the camera moves, it reveals dead bodies on the ground and a large orange structural beam overhead. The environment is lit with mixed artificial lighting, and the wet pavement reflects the neon city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza transitioning to waterfront promenade

events.description: exiting semi-covered plaza into open waterfront area with city skyline visible
turning right to follow the waterfront promenade path

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the waterfront promenade with neon-lit benches

notable_agents.action: figure standing near red and white barriers ahead

entered.detail: twin red and white striped construction barriers
orange benches with integrated warm lighting
yucca-like plants in illuminated rectangular planters
orange safety railing along the water edge

segments.scene_description: Moving from the semi-covered plaza into an open waterfront area, the scene reveals a neon-lit promenade with illuminated benches and spiky plants in planters. Red and white barriers mark the transition point, and the orange structural beam recedes to the left as the camera advances toward the water.

events.description: passing smoking vehicle wreckage on the right side of the path
slight left turn as the promenade path curves along the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade past illuminated benches and vegetation

notable_agents.action: person sitting on illuminated bench looking at handheld device

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with illuminated advertisements and graffiti
large yellow industrial dumpsters with hazard stripes
stairway and escalator structure leading upward
smoking vehicle wreckage on the grass verge

segments.scene_description: The promenade continues with regularly spaced illuminated benches and spiky plants. A concrete wall with ads runs along the right, featuring yellow dumpsters and smoking vehicle wreckage. The path curves gently, bringing an escalator structure into view ahead while the plaza elements recede behind.

events.description: navigating past pedestrians walking in the opposite direction
pedestrian with umbrella temporarily blocks the view ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade passing other pedestrians and benches

notable_agents.action: person leaning on orange railing looking out over the water
pedestrian with black umbrella walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: tall dual-headed street lamp illuminating the path
illuminated building signs and billboards in the distant cityscape

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the waterfront with more pedestrian activity. People are seen leaning on the orange railing and walking with umbrellas. The concrete wall and dumpsters are left behind as the path opens up, with distant neon signs of the city visible across the water. Street lamps provide additional lighting along the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a grim, sheltered plaza corner into an expansive, neon-lit waterfront promenade. It begins beside blue vending machines and fallen bodies under a massive orange structural beam, with wet pavement reflecting the artificial city lights. As the camera moves past red and white barriers, the scene opens into a wide pedestrian area characterized by illuminated benches and spiky plants in planters. The path then curves past a concrete wall lined with advertisements, yellow dumpsters, and smoking vehicle wreckage before an escalator structure comes into view. Finally, the environment expands further toward the water's edge, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and orange railings as the distant neon skyline glows across the harbor.
